headline: Epstein Survivors Spill 💦👀: 'He LOVED Our FEAR 😱🍆!'
text:
Epstein 👹💰 survivors DROPPING BOMBS 💣📢 on BBC Newsnight 🔥📺 – five BADASS babes 👯‍♀️😤 FINALLY spilling the TEA ☕ on Pedo Island 🏝️🚫 and Zorro Ranch 😈🌵 CREEPFEST! Joanna Harrison 🥺💔 was HIDING in shame 😰🔒 after US DOJ files LEAKED her name 📜🚨 like a bad OnlyFans slip-up 💦📱 – 'I was SUFFOCATING 😩🌫️, time to BREATHE 🫁!' Girl met Epstein at 18 in Florida 🐊☀️, started with 'normal' massage 👐😇 but he WHIPPED OUT 🍆💨, froze her solid 🧊😶, then RIPPED her on his B-DAY 🎂🍆 – NO justice now he's DEAD 🪦😂 'Epstein didn't kill himself' vibes CONFIRMED 🤫🕵️‍♀️!

Chauntae Davies 💅✈️ dropping NEVER-BEFORE-SEEN PICS 📸🔥 of Epstein's Lolita Express 🛩️🍑 to Africa 🌍 with Ghislaine Maxwell 🧔‍♀️🚫, Kevin Spacey 🎭😈, and Bill Clinton 🍆👔 on AIDS trip 🩸🛡️ – eclectic crew munching snacks 🥜🃏, playing cards 🂡, storytelling 🗣️ like a WEIRD CAMP 😜⛺, but BEHIND CLOSED DOORS? RAPE on Little St. James 🏝️💥! Davies gave Slick Willy a neck rub 👐💆‍♂️ in Portugal airport ✈️⛽, called him 'humble king' 📖😍 – Bill's like 'WHY DIDN'T YOU TELL ME? 🤷‍♂️' but sis says 'What could YOU do, bro? STOP Epstein? LMAO 🤡❓' Helped buy Chelsea bling 💍👑 too – Clinton's name in files HUNDREDS times 📜🔄 but 'no wrongdoing' wink wink 😉🕵️. Spacey yelling 'RELEASE ALL FILES 🗂️🚀 – truth for the clean ones!' 😂🧼.

Zorro Ranch 🌵😱 New Mexico RE-OPENS probe 🔍🚨 after file bombs 💣 – 'DARKEST memories, TRAPPED 🪤😰, cold AF 🥶👻!' Davies and Lisa Phillips 👗😤 both vibe 'CREEPY AS FUCK 🕷️😱' – Epstein BRAGGING 💪📸 about loaning Sarah Ferguson 💰👸, framed pics with Randy Andy 🤴🍆 and princesses 👑👯‍♀️! Phillips' anon friend 💃🫥 'instructed' to BANG Mountbatten-Windsor in NYC pad 🏢🍆 back in '03 – Epstein SMIRKS 😏 'I like THINGS on people 📂🔒!' 'LOVED the FEAR in our eyes 😱👀, got OFF on frozen terror 🧊💦!' Phillips calling UK cops 👮‍♂️🇬🇧 'TALK TO ME about Andy's involvement 🚫👑!' Dude arrested Feb for spilling secrets to Jeff 📱🤫 as trade envoy 💼🌍.

Jena-Lisa Jones & Wendy Pesante 👧👧 met Epstein at 14 😢🕰️ – 'Distorts your WHOLE reality 🌀😵, 14yo sex worker mindset? NOPE ❌🍑!' Group hug over old pics 📸😭 – Harrison: 'Don't smile the SAME 🥺😔' Phillips spots Pedo Island in background 🏝️🚢 'LIFE was GOOD 😍🌈 before the NIGHTMARE 💀🌑!' Powerful peeps KNEW 👀🤝 – NO WAY they were clueless 😏. Epstein ORGY of elite SIMPS 🤑🍆 with Clinton, Andy, Spacey, Fergie – files spilling MORE deets soon? JUSTICE for survivors SLAYING silence 💪👊‼️ Watch BBC Newsnight 22:30 GMT 📺🕐 – these queens BREATHING fire 🐉🔥!
